name: 14oz Stoneware Artisan Mug White - Room Essentials™
description:
Add sophisticated style to your drinkware with the 14-Ounce Stoneware Artisan Mug from Room Essentials™. This white mug features a round ridged design for an appealing look. Great for hot or cold beverages, this stoneware mug boasts a microwave- and dishwasher-safe design for quick reheating and cleaning.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
